concept: Now / The Present Time / This Current Moment
description: At the present time; the current moment as opposed to past or future. 'Nosa' names the temporal location of presence—the time that is happening, the only time we can act.
sound_symbolism: The word grounds in presence. 'No' settles with immediate presence, here established. Then 'sa' sustains with steady awareness, now continuing.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'mua nosa' (in now, at present). Related to 'shemu' (moment) but names the temporal location rather than the experiential quality.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Now is the only time practice happens—the present moment where mindfulness lives.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Speaking from now keeps communication current—presence rather than rehashing past or projecting future.
